text.title: Regulatory Compliance 2026 Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Regulatory Compliance 2026 end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: enumerate-regimes
step.action: List applicable regimes + effective dates + WCAG version referenced.

step.name: pin-wcag-floor
step.action: Pick highest WCAG version required across regimes; pin as floor.

step.name: produce-artefacts-per-regime
step.action: Generate VPAT-ACR (US), EAA accessibility statement (EU), AODA filing (Ontario), etc.

step.name: itemise-exceptions
step.action: List exceptions per artefact with clause citation.
step.decision-gate: If any exception is blanket, STOP and itemise.

step.name: publish-and-archive
step.action: Validate with the script; archive with counsel; publish on legal page.
